zh.lifeSummary: 當Francesco I Da Carrara於1325年9月29日出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾蒙沙時，他的父親Giacomo II da Carrara25歲，母親Liate Forzate25歲。他和Adelheid of Öttingen至少有3個女兒。他去世於1393年10月6日在義大利維圖帕多瓦享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francesco I Da Carrara于1325年9月29日出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾蒙沙时，他的父亲Giacomo II da Carrara25岁，母亲Liate Forzate25岁。他和Adelheid of Öttingen至少有3个女儿。他去世于1393年10月6日在意大利維圖帕多瓦享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Carrara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Angelo, Alessandro, Amerigo, Antonio, Arrigo, Carlo, Enzo, Gaetano, Giovanni, Guerino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of various places called Carrara, from Latin carraria ‘quarry’.

nameMeanings.name: Francesco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’, from Late Latin Franciscus. Its popularity as a given name has been much influenced by St Francis of Assisi . See Francis .

en.lifeSummary: When Francesco I Da Carrara was born on 29 September 1325, in Monza, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, his father, Giacomo II da Carrara, was 25 and his mother, Liate Forzate, was 25. He had at least 3 daughters with Adelheid of Öttingen. He died on 6 October 1393, in Padova, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Francesco I Da Carrara est né le 29 septembre 1325, à Monza, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Giacomo II da Carrara, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Liate Forzate, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Adelheid of Öttingen. Il est décédé le 6 octobre 1393, à Padova, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Francesco I Da Carrara am 29. September 1325 in Monza, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giacomo II da Carrara 25 und seine Mutter Liate Forzate 25. Er hatte mit Adelheid of Öttingen mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Oktober 1393 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Padova, Veneto, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Francesco I Da Carrara è nato il il 29 settembre 1325 nel Monza, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, il suo padre, Giacomo II da Carrara, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Liate Forzate, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Adelheid of Öttingen. Morì il 6 ottobre 1393, nel Padova, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Francesco I Da Carraraが1325年9月29日にイタリアロンバーディアミラノモンザで生まれた時，父Giacomo II da Carraraは25歳，母Liate Forzateは25歳であった。彼はAdelheid of Öttingenとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1393年10月6日にイタリアベンエトープアドヴァで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Francesco I Da Carrara(이)가 1325년 9월 29일 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 몬자에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giacomo II da Carrara(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Liate Forzate(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Adelheid of Öttingen(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 10월 6일 이탈리아 븐토 파도바에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.29 September 1325–6 October 1393: 1325 оны Есдүгээр сарын 29–1393 оны Аравдугаар сарын 6

pt.29 September 1325–6 October 1393: 29 de setembro de 1325–6 de outubro de 1393
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Francesco I Da Carrara nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1325, em Monza, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Giacomo II da Carrara, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Liate Forzate, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Adelheid of Öttingen. Ele faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1393, em Padova, Veneto, Itália, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francesco I Da Carrara родился 29 сентября 1325 г. в местности монза, милано, ломбардя, Италия, его отцу по имени Giacomo II da Carrara было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Liate Forzate, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Adelheid of Öttingen. Он умер 6 октября 1393 г. в местности падова, винето, Италия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.29 September 1325–6 October 1393: 29 de septiembre de 1325–6 de octubre de 1393
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Francesco I Da Carrara nació el 29 de septiembre de 1325, en Monza, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Giacomo II da Carrara, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Liate Forzate, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Adelheid of Öttingen. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1393, en Padova, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 68 años.
